headline: Is Boston Scientific (BSX) One of the Best Low Volatility Stocks to Buy Under $50?
summary: Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE:BSX) is one of the best low volatility stocks to buy under $50. BofA cut the price target on Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE:BSX) to $61 from $68 on June 12 and maintained a Buy rating on the shares. It noted that the firm’s services team continues to highlight a lower utilization environment, […]
